title: The Celestial City
subtitle: The welcome the whole road promised
intro: Beyond the river, the road itself seems made of morning, and the gate ahead is not guarded by suspicion.
The burden, the shame, the fear, the false names, the drowsy forgetfulness — all are behind you, unable to cross.
You did not arrive because you were strong. You arrive because grace brought you all the way home. Come in, beloved pilgrim.
intro_zh: 过河之后，道路像清晨本身一样发光，前方的门没有怀疑看守。
重担、羞耻、惧怕、假名和困倦都留在身后，不能越过河来。
你不是因自己刚强而抵达；你是被恩典一路带回家。进来吧，蒙爱的朝圣者。
spiritual_theme: Welcome, completion, and grace remembered from beginning to end
spiritual_theme_zh: 欢迎、成全，以及从始至终被恩典带领
core_mechanic: Walk the shining road, pass through the opened gate, and let the final welcome gather every chapter into praise.
core_mechanic_zh: 走上发光的道路，穿过敞开的门，让旅程归于赞美。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch16 天城 + ending/journey-review (Skills 46-47). Review = JourneyReviewScreen.

seven_beats.arrival: Ashore from the river into glory and white robes.
seven_beats.orientation: Your old gear is shown as witness, not weapons; crown-of-life imagery; a gate chapel.
seven_beats.encounter: The Shining One greets you and opens the Book of the Journey.
seven_beats.temptation: None — not a score-screen but a grace-review.
seven_beats.choice: Review the journey / open the gate / enter the final worship.
seven_beats.consequence: Every step is marked by grace, not merit; the false names, the fear and the burden cannot cross.
seven_beats.grace: The gate opens, you enter, and the whole road gathers into praise. Identity: glorified.

chapel.verse_zh: 那美好的仗我已经打过了，当跑的路我已经跑尽了。
chapel.verse_en: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.
chapel.hint_zh: 回顾这一路，不是你自己走到了这里，而是恩典带你到这里。

repentance.at: none needed — the journey review remembers grace, not merit

design.stat_arc_note: The review gathers grace from beginning to end; identity -> glorified; grant_final_seal closes the journey.
